title: AtuAmbala/TTS: Initial release
author: AtuAmbala
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This is the initial release of the project, which includes the following features and components: 
 Features: 
 
 Implemented data extraction from the freeCodeCamp GitHub repository. 
 Processed and preprocessed data using various feature selection and engineering techniques. 
 Developed a Random Forest classifier for predicting issue resolution times. 
 Implemented a Large Language Model (LLM) for issue type classification. 
 Evaluated model performance using F-score, recall, and precision metrics. 
 Analyzed and improved model accuracy through parameter tuning and feature correlation analysis. 
 
 Installation Instructions: 
 
 Install the required dependencies:
pip install -r requirements.txt 
 
 Usage: 
 
 Follow the steps in the  text_data.ipynb  notebook to process text data and train the LLM. 
 Follow the steps in the  non_text_data.ipynb  notebook to process non-text data and train the Random Forest classifier. 
 
 Acknowledgments: 
 
 Special thanks to the contributors of the freeCodeCamp repository and the open-source community for their support and resources.
